tasks.name: Task 1: Bootstrap Spring Boot Application (io-manager)
tasks.description: Set up a clean Spring Boot 3.x project (Maven or Gradle) with basic dependencies (Web, Lombok, JPA). Setup the initial package structure: controller, service, domain, config. Commit and push the initial structure to the main branch.

tasks.name: Task 2: Core Domain Models and Persistence (Project, Task, Kanban)
tasks.description: Design the core domain models (Project, Task, Kanban) in the 'domain' package. Create matching JPA entities and Repository interfaces. Include the DDL scripts (e.g., schema.sql) in 'src/main/resources'. Ensure entities map correctly to the AI-PM blueprint requirements.

tasks.name: Task 3: Implement Initial CI/CD and Remote Deployment (182.92.83.121:7100)
tasks.description: Create a deployment pipeline or an SSH-based deployment shell script that automatically builds 'io-manager' to a jar file and copies it to '182.92.83.121', then runs it on port '7100'. Add the script to 'scripts/deploy.sh'. This will enable continuous feedback and live testing.
